ai_summary: One Point One Solutions Limited has successfully completed the 100% acquisition of ITCube Solutions Private Limited for approximately INR 84 crore in cash. This strategic move significantly enhances ONEPOINT's IT and ITES capabilities, particularly in Microsoft technologies and Business Process Management, by integrating ITCube's profitable platform, established client base, and experienced workforce. ITCube has consistently generated around INR 50-54 crore in annual turnover, and no red flags or related party issues were identified in the transaction.
